executives.name: Renaud Adams
executives.background: Mr. Adams has over 30 years of experience in the mining industry. Prior to joining IAMGOLD, he was President and CEO of New Gold Inc. and previously served as President and CEO of Richmont Mines Inc. until its sale to Alamos Gold in 2017.

executives.name: Maarten Theunissen
executives.background: Mr. Theunissen is a Chartered Accountant (South Africa) and a Registered Public Accountant (South Africa). He previously served as Vice President, Finance at IAMGOLD and held senior roles at KPMG.

executives.name: Bruno Lemelin
executives.background: Mr. Lemelin has over 25 years of experience in the mining industry. He joined IAMGOLD in 2014 and has held various senior operational roles, including Senior Vice President, Operations and Projects.

executives.name: Tim Bradburn
executives.background: Mr. Bradburn has over 25 years of experience in corporate law and governance. He joined IAMGOLD in 2009 and was appointed Senior Vice President, General Counsel and Corporate Secretary in 2017.

tenure_dates.title: Senior Vice President, General Counsel and Corporate Secretary

board_of_directors.name: David Smith
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Smith is a corporate director with over 30 years of experience in the mining industry. He was formerly the Chief Financial Officer of Finning International Inc. and Ballard Power Systems.

board_of_directors.name: Renaud Adams
board_of_directors.background: President and CEO of IAMGOLD. See executive profile for details.

board_of_directors.name: Christiane Bergevin
board_of_directors.background: Ms. Bergevin is a corporate director and former Executive Vice-President, Strategic Partnerships at Desjardins Group. She also served as President of SNC-Lavalin Capital.

board_of_directors.name: Ann Miller
board_of_directors.background: Ms. Miller is a corporate director and former Vice President, General Counsel and Corporate Secretary of Newmont Corporation.

board_of_directors.name: Kevin O'Kane
board_of_directors.background: Mr. O'Kane is a mining executive with over 35 years of experience, including senior roles at BHP Billiton and SSR Mining.

board_of_directors.name: Peter O'Hagan
board_of_directors.background: Mr. O'Hagan has over 30 years of experience in commodities and structured finance, including roles at Goldman Sachs and Trafigura.
